final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing promotional poster for the brand "RAN QIU".

Style/medium: needs an Eastern aesthetic with minimalist, natural-poetic, warm-healing sensibility — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space with shallow depth of field — exact framing tightness is yours
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand mark
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere with natural elements — exact botanical selection and arrangement is yours
Lighting/mood: needs golden hour warmth with a poetic, serene atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) — exact ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve generous negative space, warm color direction, shallow depth of field aesthetic
Avoid:
